title: pyrus estiensis
side_effects: Pyrus estiensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness in some individuals. In severe cases, prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can lead to respiratory problems, including asthma-like symptoms and shortness of breath. Furthermore, improper use of Pyrus estiensis can also cause gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and stomach pain, due to its high toxicity levels. Additionally, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts has been linked to liver and kidney damage in some animal studies.
